title: JavaScript Dialog Boxes Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of alert(), confirm(), and prompt() in JavaScript.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the best way to display an alert with "Hello!" in a browser?
What does a confirm() box return when the user clicks "Cancel"?
What is the return type of a prompt() box if the user clicks "OK"?
What happens to the JavaScript execution while an alert box is open?
options: The script continues to run in the background.
The browser execution is blocked until the alert is closed.
The script moves to the next turn immediately.

questions.question: Which property can you use to customize the appearance of built-in alert boxes?
